name: MMO Maid Tic-Tac-Toe
description: Multiplayer tic-tac-toe with cross-server ELO leaderboard. Players create tables and challenge each other in real-time directly from the dashboard using their Discord login.
author: EmberStream Studio

slash_commands.name: tictactoe
slash_commands.description: Open the MMO Maid Tic-Tac-Toe menu (play, stats, leaderboard).

permissions_user_facing: Read your Discord username and avatar to display in the lobby and on match results
Track your tic-tac-toe ELO rating and match history globally across all servers
